channel.title: X86 on Cedric Bail
channel.description: Recent content in X86 on Cedric Bail

item.title: Byte Iteration at 32 Lanes: The Decomposed Index Path
item.description: When we set out to make for i, b := range byteSlice fast on AVX2, the first thing that went wrong was the index vector. This article explains what happened, the technique we used to fix it, and the chain of bugs the fix resolved along the way.
